instruction:
Using the iterative method to find the root of the equation
$$
f(x) = x - e^{-x} = 0
$$
in the interval $[\frac{1}{2}, \ln 2]$, what is the root $\alpha$, accurate to 4 significant figures?

Options:
A. $$ \alpha\approx0.567125 $$
B. $$ \alpha\approx0.567142 $$
C. $$ \alpha\approx0.567113 $$
D. $$ \alpha\approx0.567190 $$
E. $$ \alpha\approx0.567161 $$
F. $$ \alpha\approx0.567178 $$
G. $$ \alpha\approx0.567099 $$
H. $$ \alpha\approx0.567132 $$
I. $$ \alpha\approx0.567149 $$
J. $$
\alpha\approx0.567157
$$
